race_meta.race_name: Ryanair Chase (Registered As The Festival Trophy) (Grade 1) (GBB Race)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed banbridge at position 3 (15.0% probability) vs top pick Fact To File (35.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~20.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Fact To File > Jonbon, but actual result was Banbridge > Jonbon. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Banbridge had well-aligned model/market values (divergence 0.0%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
